name: Ulusoy Elektrik Imalat Taahhut ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Ulusoy Elektrik Imalat Taahh√É¬ºt ve Ticaret A.S. designs, manufactures, and sells solutions for electricity generation, transmission, and distribution systems primarily in Turkey. It offers metal enclosed modular, metal clad, and gas insulated switchgears; and compact transformer substations, medium voltage distribution transformers and switchgear components, and medium voltage cable accessories. The company also exports its products to approximately 70 countries. Ulusoy Elektrik Imalat Taahh√É¬ºt ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey. Ulusoy Elektrik Imalat Taahh√É¬ºt ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Eaton Industries XX Unlimited Company.
